name: Master Glue
explanation: A classic British console-style mix-bus 'glue' compressor for gelling a whole mix into one cohesive, punchy whole. A feed-forward, stereo-LINKED VCA detector watches the summed program and drives a single soft-knee gain-reduction element computed in the dB domain, so the same reduction hits both channels and the stereo image stays rock-solid. Ratio is stepped between the classic 2:1, 4:1 and 10:1 settings, Attack is stepped, and Release offers four fixed times plus an AUTO position whose program-dependent dual time-constant 'breathes' with the music — fast on transients, slow under sustained loudness. Makeup restores level, Mix blends parallel dry for New-York glue, and a soft output stage keeps the bus bounded. Controls: Threshold, Ratio, Attack, Release, Makeup and Mix.
